description_long: This object consists of two thick, stacked books with dark reddish-brown covers, bound together by a wide, textured black strap running vertically across their center. The covers are adorned with intricate, geometric silver designs, including a prominent star-like motif and angular corner embellishments. The spines are rounded and feature a small, ornate silver emblem. The pages are a light cream color, visible along the sides and bottom edges. The books have a slightly worn, matte finish, suggesting frequent handling. The overall appearance is mystical or arcane, reminiscent of ancient tomes or spellbooks.
description: Two thick, reddish-brown books with silver geometric designs are bound together by a wide black strap, giving them an arcane and mystical appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stacked books' cream-colored pages and the silver star-like design on the cover, with the black strap running vertically.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rounded spines, a small silver emblem, and the black strap bisecting the books vertically.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with visible cream-colored pages and the geometric cover design, but the strap is more prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the black strap and the clean, unmarked book edges.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a large, intricate silver geometric star design with angular accents at the corners, giving it a mystical or arcane appearance. There are no figurative illustrations, only abstract, symbolic patterns.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark reddish-brown with a small, ornate silver emblem near the top. No text is visible, and the design is simple and decorative.
